name: Dr. Ada Mesmer
description: Ada was born in 1864 in Germany on a territory Lubeck. Ada Mesmer is a well-educated psychologist, born into a family of doctors. At the age of 25, she began dedicating herself to hypnotherapy research, using hypnotic suggestions to eliminate pain, fear, and other negative emotions plaguing her patients. However, her theories repeatedly failed, and the subjects did not respond to her hypnosis because they could not bear the pain she caused them. After several unsuccessful attempts, she had no choice but to leave the institute and look for new subjects and research methods. A few years later, during her short stay at the White Sand Street Asylum, Ada met a patient with amnesia, Emil. Quiet and mysterious, he was exceptionally sensitive to hypnosis. Ada became increasingly attracted to Emil and confirmed that he was the ideal test subject she was looking for. Having been appointed a psychologist and Emil's chief medical officer, she began to communicate more with the patient.
creator: Китчи мао
